productDisplayName: Nike Women White and Green Sneakers
description: Style NoteGet ready to move in style with these Starlet Saddle shoes from nike. The sleek design of these shoes makes it possible to pair it with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Product DetailsGreen checked print shoe with fabric upper and tough synthetic liningHas synthetic overlays, Nike swoosh overlay near the midfoot region and central lace-upsBranding on the tongue and heel collarPadded tongue and innerPhylon midsole TPU outsole with herringbone groovesWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)Material and CareFabric, syntheticRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
